name: Ebisu Shinsen Matsuri
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>海老須</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えびす</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鮮</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>まつり
desc: Once per Chain, if an Effect Monster(s) is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; Special Summon 1 "Shinsen Token" (Aqua/WATER/Level 3/ATK 0/DEF 0) to its controller's opponent's field in Defense Position. Once per Battle Phase, at the start of the Battle Phase: You can destroy both this card and as many Tokens on the field as possible, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Ebisu Token" (Fairy/WATER/Level 7/ATK ?/DEF ?). This Token's ATK/DEF become the number of Tokens destroyed by this effect x 700.
eff: Once per Chain, if an Effect Monster(s) is Special Summoned (except during the Damage Step): You can target 1 of them; Special Summon 1 "Shinsen Token" (Aqua/WATER/Level 3/ATK 0/DEF 0) to its controller's opponent's field in Defense Position. Once per Battle Phase, at the start of the Battle Phase: You can destroy both this card and as many Tokens on the field as possible, and if you do, Special Summon 1 "Ebisu Token" (Fairy/WATER/Level 7/ATK ?/DEF ?). This Token's ATK/DEF become the number of Tokens destroyed by this effect x 700.

summoning: Special Summons Tokens to your opponent's field
misc: At the start of the Battle Phase
